import pytest
from source import subsequences


def test_subsequences_k2_returns_all_pairs():
    result = subsequences(a=1, b=5, k=2)
    expected = [[1, 2], [1, 3], [1, 4], [2, 3], [2, 4], [3, 4]]
    assert result == expected, (
        f"subsequences(1, 5, 2) should return 6 pairs (C(4,2)=6) but got {result!r}; "
        "base case returning [] instead of [[]] collapses all branches to empty"
    )
